rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contracts, with type scopes for assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Input envelope assumptions should use visible feature names and concrete bounds.
Output guarantees should relate visible outputs to visible inputs without implementation-only paths.
Ensure type alignment between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicit typed ports or constants are available.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq declarations for boolean range checks: eq var : bool = x >= min and x <= max;
Place AGREE annex blocks inside annex agree {** ... **};
Component type contracts should not reference subcomponent ports directly.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not use Boolean domain values as integers in range comparisons.
Do not reference AADL timing properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing tokens
